Omar Chehab

Here are details regarding my Ph.D. defense on Advances in Self-Supervised Learning: Applications to Neuroscience and Sample-Efficiency.

Ph.D. Defense

  • Date & Time: Friday, November 24, 2:00 - 4:30 p.m.
  • Location: Room Gilles Kahn, Inria Saclay, 1 Rue Honoré d’Estienne d’Orves, 91120.
  • RSVP for In-Person Attendance: By Wednesday, November 15. Please message me to confirm.
  • Virtual Attendance: webex link here (you can watch in your browser, no download needed)

Note: Due to security protocols, a valid ID is required for entry. If the location or timing is inconvenient, you may consider joining virtually.

Directions: From Paris, it’s an hour by public transport or 40 minutes by car. For public transit:

  1. Train. Take the RER B train to the stop “Massy Palaiseau”, then walk 5 minutes to the bus stops located in front of “Basserie-Tabac du metro”.
  2. Bus. Take bus 91.06 to the stop “Place Marguerite Perey”, then walk for 5 minutes to the Alan Turing building of Inria Saclay. This should match the itenerary suggested by Google Maps, for example:

Afterparty

  • Date & Time: Friday, November 24, 8:00 p.m.
  • Location: the Long Hop Pub in Paris (5th arrondissement).

If you’re joining the afterparty, kindly message me for headcount planning.

Last updated June 21, 2024.
